mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE del_flag = 0) AS userTotal, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role WHERE del_flag = 0) AS roleTotal, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_dept WHERE del_flag = 0) AS deptTotal, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_menu WHERE del_flag = 0) AS menuTotal, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_permission WHERE del_flag = 0 AND status = 1) AS permissionTotal, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM sys_user_perm) AS directGrantUserTotal

SELECT r.role_name AS name, COUNT(ur.user_id) AS value FROM sys_role r LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE r.del_flag = 0 GROUP BY r.id, r.role_name ORDER BY value DESC, r.id ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT p.perm_key AS permKey, p.name AS permName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_menu_permission mp WHERE mp.perm_id = p.id) AS menuBindCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role_perm rp WHERE rp.perm_id = p.id) AS roleBindCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user_perm up WHERE up.perm_id = p.id) AS userBindCount FROM sys_permission p WHERE p.del_flag = 0 AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY roleBindCount DESC, userBindCount DESC, menuBindCount DESC, p.id ASC

SELECT u.id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, COUNT(DISTINCT perm_source.perm_id) AS permissionCount FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ur.user_id, rp.perm_id FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role_perm rp ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id UNION ALL SELECT up.user_id, up.perm_id FROM sys_user_perm up ) perm_source ON perm_source.user_id = u.id WHERE u.del_flag = 0 GROUP BY u.id, u.nickname ORDER BY permissionCount DESC, u.id ASC LIMIT 10
